Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3 	Session 4
M A R K C O M P L E T E
In this training, Dean is going to share with you the difference between a website and a funnel. Thanks to the incredible Russell Brunson, funnels are
officially a mainstream topic in today’s digital world. Unlike the robust and sometimes confusing layout of a website, a funnel is designed to take your
page visitor from point A to point B to point C. This video is going to explain this theory in more depth.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Understand the importance of using a funnel over a website.
Remember that the first step of your funnel is your group, workshop or mastermind landing page.
Remember that there are 2 different options after a landing page. An order page or an application page.
Make sure you choose the right second page based on your price point.
